text:
Market today: The AI boom is still the main driver, even with some choppy signals. Tech names are reacting to both the hype and potential volatility.

Your holdings: SOXL is down a painful -38.11%, and SPAL is down -52.96%. Both are leveraged and need close watching, especially on margin. SPY is flagged to SELL, and QQQI/QQQ are TRIM/SELL.

Watch: Intel's AI revenue jump and the S&P 500 sell signals are key.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for broader market signals.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming if it breaks below recent lows, given leverage and decay.
SPAL: Watch stop loss closely; this leveraged ETF is highly volatile.
No new buys today - hold and watch
